title: Hiring Software Engineer at Milkbasket Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at Milkbasket Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Join the Milkbasket Ventures Solutions family as a Software Engineer in Varanasi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Milkbasket Ventures Solutions:
Milkbasket Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milkbasket Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
